class.name: SplineIK3D
class.description: A [SkeletonModifier3D] for aligning bones on [Path3D]. If the root bone joint and the starting point of [Path3D] are apart, it assumes that there is a linear line segment between them. If you want [Path3D] to attach a specific bone, it is recommended to place [ModifierBoneTarget3D] before [SplineIK3D] in the [SkeletonModifier3D] list (children of the [Skeleton3D]), and then place [Path3D] as [ModifierBoneTarget3D]'s child. Bone twist is determined based on the [method Curve3D.get_point_tilt].

method.name: get_end_vector
method.description: Returns how to handle the remaining bones when the path is not closed and the length of the bone chain is longer than the path.

method.name: get_path_3d
method.description: Returns the node path of the [Path3D] which is describing the path.

method.name: is_tilt_enabled
method.description: Returns the tilt property of [Curve3D] takes effect to the bone twist.

method.name: set_end_vector
method.description: Sets how to handle the remaining bones when the path is not closed and the length of the bone chain is longer than the path.

method.name: set_path_3d
method.description: Sets the node path of the [Path3D] which is describing the path.

method.name: set_tilt_enabled
method.description: Sets the tilt property of [Curve3D] takes effect to the bone twist.

constants.constant: The remaining bones are not processed and keep at the pose values they had before [Curve3D] was processed.
Extends a straight line in the tangent direction from the end point to the end point.
Extends a straight line in the forward vector direction from the parent of the most processed child bone in the bone chain.
